author: nc1234
content: I think it has something to do with ProposerPreferences is not correctly parsed in buildoor. I think you need to update https://github.com/ethpandaops/buildoor/blob/47bd02d9ad599ddb4959ff9703c177885ccaa617/pkg/proposerpreferences/service.go#L106 to use targetGasLimit

author: bharath.vedartham
content: this is fine, the SSE event json for proposer preferences marshalls targetGasLimit to gasLimit. That event is my custom impl which will change here

author: bharath.vedartham
content: i think lodestar just needs to update their gas limit check and things will be fine
